prompt: What is the average maximum section size per department?

inputData.question: What is the average maximum section size per department?

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"What is the average maximum section size per department?"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"What is the average maximum section size per department?"},"startedAt":1771855723563,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"The question asks for the average maximum section size per department. I need to:
1. Join course_sections to courses to get department_id
2. Join courses to departments to get department information
3. Group by department
4. Calculate the average of max_students (section size) for each department
5. Order by department name for deterministic output

The schema shows:
- course_sections has max_students (section size) and course_id
- courses has department_id and id
- departments has id and name
","sql":"
SELECT 
  d.name AS department_name,
  AVG(cs.max_students) AS avg_max_section_size
FROM departments d
INNER JOIN courses c ON d.id = c.department_id
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name
ORDER BY d.name
","assumptions":["max_students in course_sections represents the maximum section size","We are calculating the average across all sections in each department","Null values in max_students will be excluded from the average calculation"]},"endedAt":1771855752571},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"

FROM departments d

INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name
ORDER BY d.name

visualization.title: Average Maximum Section Size per Department

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  d.name AS department_name,
  AVG(cs.max_students) AS avg_max_section_size
FROM departments d
INNER JOIN courses c ON d.id = c.department_id
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name
ORDER BY d.name

result.sql:
SELECT 
  d.name AS department_name,
  AVG(cs.max_students) AS avg_max_section_size
FROM departments d
INNER JOIN courses c ON d.id = c.department_id
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name
ORDER BY d.name
